chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-705 of 2014 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of main case 10-03-2025 Mr. Pervaiz Iqbal Advocate for the Petitioner Ms. Masooda Siraj Advocate for the Respondent Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General Per learned counsel petition may be dismissed as withdrawn leaving the Petitioner at liberty to agitate its grievance before the competent authority if so instructed and subject to law. In view hereof, petition is dismissed as withdrawn. Judge Judge Amjad PS
